important_claims.evidence: DeepSurvey: Enhancing Analytical Depth and Citation Reliability in Automated Survey Generation Ziyue Yang*1,Da Ma *1,Hanqi Li 1,4,Zijian Wang 1,Tiancheng Huang 1,Zijian Hu 1,Chenrun Wang1,2,Yunzhe Zhang 1,Xiaobao Wu 1,Kai Yu 1,3,4,Lu Chen †1,2,3,4 1X-LANCE Lab, School of Computer Science, Shanghai Jiao Tong University, Shanghai, China, 2Shanghai Innovation Institution, Shanghai, China, 3Jiangsu Key Lab of Language Computing, Suzhou, China, 4Suzhou Laboratory, Suzhou, China *Equal Contribution †Correspondence to:chenlusz@sjtu.edu.cn As scientific literature grows rapidly, automated survey generation has become a key capability for AI scientists and human researchers. However, existing systems suffer from limited analytical depth due to reliance on abstracts and isolated paper processing, and unreliable citations from imprecise retrieval and post-hoc grounding, producing superficial surveys and may mislead researchers. We presentDeepSurvey, an agentic system that addresses both.

keynote.reuse_value_for_research: Useful as structured evidence if quality and citation checks pass.
